prompt: The exact prompt. For logic errors, include the argument or reasoning chain you asked the model to evaluate or produce.
response: The exact model response showing the logical error.

failure_analysis.description: Identify the exact logical form of the error. Name the fallacy if applicable. Show the correct logical form and contrast with what the model produced.
failure_analysis.verified_by: Standard propositional logic / textbook reference / formal proof

impact: What reasoning would be corrupted if this error propagated?
mitigation: What techniques could detect or prevent this class of logical error?
